entry.title: Conformance badge SVG + JSON schemas + custom OG images
entry.summary: Round 6: live shields.io-style SVG badge at /api/cert-badge?url=... showing the live RFC-002 + RFC-004 conformance score of any target URL. Plus 4 published JSON schemas (operational-log-entry, agents, certification, cross-jurisdiction-audit). Plus custom OG images for /auditor, /legislacion, /certifier.

entry.title: /certifier — verify any sociedad-IA in seconds (reference impl: 100/100)
entry.summary: Round 5: paste any URL, get a 0-100 RFC conformance score in seconds. UI at /certifier, programmatic at /api/certifier, library at cookbook recipe 26. Reference implementation self-certifies at 100/100 Rating A. GitHub Actions workflow template for downstream sociedades. llms.txt updated to expose all new endpoints.

entry.title: RFC-004 conformance vectors + /legislación + /registro + OpenAPI 3.1
entry.summary: Round 4: 7 frozen RFC-004 conformance vectors with hex-exact HMAC values (/test-vectors/rfc-004-v1.json). /legislación — Spanish synthesis with suggested cite-by-reference legislative text. /registro — public list of known implementations. OpenAPI 3.1 schema at /api/openapi. 11 new vitest tests (96 total).

entry.title: RFC-004 (operational-log spec) + /auditor + cookbook recipe 25
entry.summary: Round 3: RFC-004 normative operational-log specification. /auditor — Spanish-first 1-page regulator-facing brief. Cookbook recipe 25 — quarterly compliance report generator. The documents legislation can cite + the function ops teams can run.

entry.title: /data-room + /codegen + /architecture/security + RFC-003 + recipe 24
entry.summary: Round 2: /data-room with live npm + GitHub numbers. /codegen multi-language snippets. /architecture/security code-level threat walkthrough. RFC-003 cross-jurisdictional reciprocity envelope. Cookbook recipe 24 sociedad-IA disaster recovery.

entry.title: /architecture/audit-log + /walkthrough + /embed + CSV export + recipe 23
entry.summary: Round 1: 11-section /architecture/audit-log deep-dive. /walkthrough annotated demo. /embed playground for badge embedding. CSV export endpoint. Cookbook recipe 23. Astro merge readiness review.

entry.title: 17 npm packages live + landing site with RFC-001 + RFC-002
entry.summary: Initial launch: 17 published npm packages covering MercadoPago, AFIP/ARCA identity, banking, WhatsApp, facturación, shipping, GDE/TAD, BCRA, IGJ, BoletínOficial, MercadoLibre, AP2, ACP, MCP. RFC-001 three-layer liability framework. RFC-002 agent-discovery convention. Live demos at ar-agents-{mp,cuit,whatsapp,bridge}-hello.vercel.app.
